A proclamation.: It having pleased Almighty God ... to bestow great and manifold mercies ... Resolved, that it be and hereby is recommended to ... the said states, to appoint Wednesday the thirtieth day of December next ... as a day of public thanksgiving ... Done in Congress this seventeenth day of November, 1778 ..
by
United States. Continental Congress.
First published in 1778
18 editions

Office for Foreign Affairs, September 19, 1785.: The Secretary of the United States for the Department of Foreign Affairs, in obedience to the order of Congress of August 9, 1785, respecting the number of consuls necessary to be appointed, and for what foreign ports, reports, that in his opinion it would be expedient to have consuls in ... All which is submitted to the wisdom of Congress. John Jay.
by
United States. Dept. of Foreign Affairs.
First published in 1785
